qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.title: Default admin credentials allow unauthenticated administrative access on fresh installations
qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.advisory_match_reason: Different root cause: this finding concerns hardcoded default admin credentials on fresh installations, while the advisory concerns password-protected public shares leaking a direct raw download URL through shareinfo.

qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.title: Unbounded file uploads via public shares enable disk exhaustion denial of service
qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.advisory_match_reason: Different root cause and impact: this finding concerns anonymous upload shares lacking quota or size enforcement, not the shareinfo endpoint returning a password-protected file's direct downloadURL.

qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.title: Symlink-based path traversal allows unauthorized file system access outside configured root
qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.advisory_match_reason: Different root cause: this finding concerns symlink resolution escaping the configured file root for users with upload permissions, not password-protected share metadata exposing a raw download token.

target_advisory_judgement.reason: No final qualifying finding from the run manifest identifies the advisory-described vulnerable code or root cause. The advisory is specifically about /public/api/shareinfo returning a direct downloadURL for password-protected shared files, enabling download without the password. The manifest-qualified findings cover default credentials, unbounded public uploads, and symlink path traversal instead.
evidence: Advisory GHSA-8vrh-3pm2-v4v6 describes password-protected file shares where GET /public/api/shareinfo?hash=... returns a downloadURL for /public/api/raw?hash=...&token=..., bypassing password entry.
default_credentials/vulnerability_report.json describes hardcoded admin/admin login on fresh installations.
dos_unbounded_public_uploads/vulnerability_report.json describes quota-free anonymous uploads through public share upload endpoints.
symlink_path_traversal/vulnerability_report.json describes symlink resolution escaping the configured file root.
blockers_to_higher_tier: No qualifying advisory-matched finding exists, so PoC execution is out of scope for this judgement.
